programme.title: U-Turn
programme.desc: While investigating accidents on a flyover, an intern journalist is accused of murder.

programme.title: Sniff
programme.desc: A laboratory accident enhances Sunny's olfactory abilities and he turns into a superhero.

programme.title: Madaari
programme.desc: Nirmal kidnaps the son of the home minister and forces the government to meet his demands.

programme.title: Chalo Dilli
programme.desc: Stuck with an unsophisticated fellow traveller for hours after missing a flight, a high-society woman wends her way through diverse Indian neighbourhoods to reach Delhi.

programme.title: Gold
programme.desc: Tapan Das, a passionate team manager with a penchant for alcohol, embarks a ragtag group of hockey players on an ambitious quest for independent India's first Olympic gold medal.

programme.title: Dil Dhadakne Do
programme.desc: Kamal and Neelam's loving facade hides their strained marriage.

programme.title: Mili
programme.desc: Mili, a young woman, accidentally gets stuck in a walk-in freezer at her workplace. Racing against time, she must find a way to survive.

programme.title: Uri: The Surgical Strike
programme.desc: The Indian Army retaliates against militants who attacked an army base in Uri in 2016.

programme.title: Khaali Peeli
programme.desc: Pooja and Blackie reunite after she bravely escapes from a brothel.

programme.title: Raazi
programme.desc: A Kashmiri woman walks the tightrope between marriage and duty to protect her motherland.

programme.title: Nil Battey Sannata
programme.desc: When Apeksha loses her interest in studies, her mother rejoins school to motivate her.

programme.title: Buddha in a Traffic Jam
programme.desc: A management student's social media success stirs idealogical conflicts.

programme.title: The Last Color
programme.desc: A young tightrope walker befriends a widow who wishes to play Holi but cannot do so..

programme.title: Saand Ki Aankh
programme.desc: Two determined women quietly train in sharpshooting and defy expectations.

programme.title: Silence
programme.desc: A narcotics officer joins a special task force investigating a high-profile murder.

programme.title: Dil Juunglee
programme.desc: Love blossoms between Koroli and Sumit when the latter joins her English class.

programme.title: Tarla
programme.desc: Tarla Dalal takes on an inspirational journey to change the country's culinary landscape.

programme.title: Parmanu: The Story of Pokhran
programme.desc: A team of Indian government officials must manoeuvre a high-stakes nuclear test in a town in Rajasthan without being detected by reconnaissance satellites or espionage networks.

programme.title: Cheeni Kum
programme.desc: Buddhadev, a 64-year-old chef, falls in love with a 34-year-old software engineer, Nina.

programme.title: Kismat Konnection
programme.desc: An architect and a social activist find themselves connected in a strange way by destiny.

programme.title: Chandu Champion
programme.desc: An extraordinary man confronts relentless challenges with unwavering determination.

programme.title: Rashmi Rocket
programme.desc: A small-town girl becomes a national athlete but must undergo a gender test.

programme.title: Madras Cafe
programme.desc: Vikram, an Indian intelligence agent who visits Sri Lanka on a secret mission, finds himself embroiled in a civil war and a conspiracy to kill the former prime minister of India.

programme.title: The Great Indian Butterfly
programme.desc: Krish and Meera, a married couple, try finding the Great Indian Butterfly, which is a legendary insect that is rumoured to grant immense peace to the person who captures it.

programme.title: Satya Gang
programme.desc: Satya and Raj, who are orphans, own a garage and make a living out of it. However, their lives turn tragic when a notorious gang commit numerous murders and make them the culprits.

programme.title: Shark Island
programme.desc: Four friends in a resort island have to save themselves from genetically modified sharks while trying to find a cure in a nearby research centre.

programme.title: Thackeray
programme.desc: Balasaheb Thackeray, a cartoonist with a no-nonsense personality, plays a key role in the birth of the Shiv Sena and goes on to become the most influential political leader in Maharashtra.

programme.title: Agneepath
programme.desc: When his father is wrongfully murdered by Kancha Cheena, a ruthless crime lord, Vijay grows up and embarks on a path of revenge by befriending Rauf Lala, a local kingpin.

programme.title: Aavesham
programme.desc: Three boys move into a hostel to pursue engineering, where they clash with seniors. To get revenge, they befriend a gangster.

programme.title: Hungama
programme.desc: A millionaire businessman living in a village decides to move to the city with his wife. However, things take a comical turn as a case of mistaken identity causes chaos in their lives.

programme.title: Guardian
programme.desc: An unavenged woman returns from the dead to terrify and terrorise those who tormented her when she was alive.

programme.title: Harom Hara
programme.desc: Subrahmanyam loses his job and enters into illegal arms trade to become a notorious dealer.

programme.title: Mission 118
programme.desc: An investigative journalist has nightmares about a young woman's murder and tries to uncover whether his dreams have any connection to reality.

programme.title: Baazaar
programme.desc: An amateur stock trader, Rizwan, goes to Mumbai and works for the successful Gujarati trader, Shakun Kothari. Everything seems to be going smooth until Rizwan faces betrayal from his idol.

programme.title: Son Of Devil
programme.desc: When a man rescues a woman from several thugs, who are harassing her, she falls in love with him. However, she is unaware of his dark past and deep secrets.

programme.title: Angrezi Mein Kehte Hain
programme.desc: Yashwant, a middle-aged man, refrains from expressing his love for his wife, Kiran. As a result, their relationship develops cracks and they decide to part ways.

programme.title: Halla Bol
programme.desc: Ashfaq, a self-centred and arrogant Bollywood star, must confront his own values when a murder accusation forces him to choose between maintaining his celebrity status and clearing his conscience.

programme.title: Kabali
programme.desc: A man spends 25 years in prison for fighting against oppression. Old but still bloodthirsty, he decides to seek revenge against his enemies upon his release.

programme.title: Yashoda
programme.desc: Surrogate mother Yashodha is advised to follow a few guidelines to keep herself and her baby healthy and safe. However, something happens at the surrogate centre that puts both of them at risk.

programme.title: Ready
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identities causes Prem and Sanjana to fall in love. Meanwhile, Sanjana's uncles try to get the money that she has inherited and Prem convinces them to marry her off to him.

programme.title: Sita Ram
programme.desc: Ram, a young boy, lives in a monastery waiting for Sita to return and take care of him. However, Sita returns, years later, but with an ulterior motive.

programme.title: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Forced to live a detached life in the Andaman Islands, a secret agent comes across a woman pursued by debtors and tries to protect her.

programme.title: Custody
programme.desc: A police constable's life takes a drastic turn when he is entrusted with producing a criminal in court. While the mobster remains under his custody, Shiva must dodge every threat to keep him alive.

programme.title: Hundred
programme.desc: The Northern Superchargers face a challenge against Birmingham Phoenix's Ben Duckett and Trent Boult at Headingley.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: T20: 2006 SA v AUS
programme.desc: Johannesburg, Feb 24th, 2006. After a comfortable win against South Africa in their first T20I match ever in Brisbane the previous year, Ricky Ponting leads an all-star team in their first T20I match on South African soil.

programme.title: CPL
programme.desc: Game 2: St Kitts and Nevis face the formidable Amazon Warriors, who boast top players like Imran Tahir and Shai Hope.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Annabel Sutherland and Georgia Wareham clash with an Ellyse Perry-led Birmingham Phoenix. Both pushing for a top-half spot.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The Northern Superchargers face a challenge against Birmingham Phoenix's Ben Duckett and Trent Boult at Headingley.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: T20 Classic
programme.desc: With the 3-match series tied at 1-1, Captain Aaron Finch’s men bring the series down to the wire in Sydney.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The Northern Superchargers face a challenge against Birmingham Phoenix's Ben Duckett and Trent Boult at Headingley.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Annabel Sutherland and Georgia Wareham clash with an Ellyse Perry-led Birmingham Phoenix. Both pushing for a top-half spot.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: The Northern Superchargers face a challenge against Birmingham Phoenix's Ben Duckett and Trent Boult at Headingley.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Australia's impressive lineup gets even better with the return of Travis Head and Josh Hazlewood, while South Africa aims for an upset in Darwin.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: Pre Game
programme.desc: Don't miss a moment of the Australia vs. South Africa series. The best team in cricket has all the highlights, previews, and analysis.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Mitchell Marsh’s Australia faces a series-decider clash in Cairns after a Brevis-inspired South Africa leveled the series.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The game may be taking a break, but we're not. Keep watching for exclusive interviews, an analysis of team strategies, highlights, and more.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Mitchell Marsh’s Australia faces a series-decider clash in Cairns after a Brevis-inspired South Africa leveled the series.

programme.title: Post Game
programme.desc: Join the Fox Cricket team for the best review from the day of cricket with this Post Game show.

programme.title: Hundred
programme.desc: Joe Root's Trent Rockets face a tough test against a powerful Southern Brave squad that includes Australian Hilton Cartwright.

programme.title: Hundred
programme.desc: All eyes will be on Steve Smith as his Welsh Fire travels to The Oval to face the defending champions, Oval Invincibles.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Australia's impressive lineup gets even better with the return of Travis Head and Josh Hazlewood, while South Africa aims for an upset in Darwin.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Game 2: With Tim David's fantastic performance securing a 1-0 series lead, Australia now aims to extend its winning streak to 10 consecutive T20 victories.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Mitchell Marsh’s Australia faces a series-decider clash in Cairns after a Brevis-inspired South Africa leveled the series.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: David Warner will be hoping for a good performance at Lord's. London Spirit face a Trent Rockets side who are strong title contenders.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Mitchell Marsh’s Australia faces a series-decider clash in Cairns after a Brevis-inspired South Africa leveled the series.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: Grace Harris's London Spirit take on the spin of Ash Gardner and Alana King’s Trent Rockets at the historic Lords.

programme.title: CPL
programme.desc: Game 3: Newcomers Antigua & Barbuda Falcons test their mettle against the Rovman Powell-led Barbados Royals.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Mitchell Marsh’s Australia faces a series-decider clash in Cairns after a Brevis-inspired South Africa leveled the series.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: League leaders Southern Brave face the Trent Rockets. Australian Ash Gardner and Alana King will look for a key victory at Trent Bridge.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Mitchell Marsh’s Australia faces a series-decider clash in Cairns after a Brevis-inspired South Africa leveled the series.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: Joe Root's Trent Rockets face a tough test against a powerful Southern Brave squad that includes Australian Hilton Cartwright.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Mitchell Marsh’s Australia faces a series-decider clash in Cairns after a Brevis-inspired South Africa leveled the series.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: The Oval Invincibles with Meg Lanning will be looking to deter an upset from Jess Jonassen and the Welsh Fire.

programme.title: T20 AUS v SA
programme.desc: Mitchell Marsh’s Australia faces a series-decider clash in Cairns after a Brevis-inspired South Africa leveled the series.

programme.title: The Hundred Mini
programme.desc: All eyes will be on Steve Smith as his Welsh Fire travels to The Oval to face the defending champions, Oval Invincibles.

programme.title: T20 Mini AUS v SA
programme.desc: Mitchell Marsh’s Australia faces a series-decider clash in Cairns after a Brevis-inspired South Africa leveled the series.

programme.title: The Hundred Women's Mini
programme.desc: The Oval Invincibles with Meg Lanning will be looking to deter an upset from Jess Jonassen and the Welsh Fire.

programme.title: Hundred W
programme.desc: Beth Mooney leads the Originals against Superchargers with Annabel Sutherland. The Superchargers will look to continue their impressive form.

programme.title: Hundred
programme.desc: The Northern Superchargers take on the Manchester Originals in a crucial north-west derby.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M13 Hlts
programme.desc: Two games in to the new campaign, Joe Root and the Trent Rockets take an unbeaten start to Lord's for a contest with David Warner and London Spirit, who come from defeat. (14.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M13 Hlts
programme.desc: Ashleigh Gardner's Trent Rockets venture to the home of cricket in pursuit of a first Women's Hundred win of 2025, taking on Charlie Dean's unbeaten London Spirit. (14.08)

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: Birmingham Phoenix go to Leeds in pursuit of some momentum as Liam Livingstone's side take on the Superchargers and Graham Clark, who performed final-ball heroics last time out.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M13 Hlts
programme.desc: Two games in to the new campaign, Joe Root and the Trent Rockets take an unbeaten start to Lord's for a contest with David Warner and London Spirit, who come from defeat. (14.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M13 Hlts
programme.desc: Ashleigh Gardner's Trent Rockets venture to the home of cricket in pursuit of a first Women's Hundred win of 2025, taking on Charlie Dean's unbeaten London Spirit. (14.08)

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: An out-of-nick Phoenix go to Headingley for a Women's Hundred match with Northern Superchargers, whose perfect start came to an end Wednesday in defeat to the table toppers.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M13 Hlts
programme.desc: Two games in to the new campaign, Joe Root and the Trent Rockets take an unbeaten start to Lord's for a contest with David Warner and London Spirit, who come from defeat. (14.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M14 Hlts
programme.desc: An out-of-nick Phoenix go to Headingley for a Women's Hundred match with Northern Superchargers, whose perfect start came to an end Wednesday in defeat to the table toppers. (15.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M13 Hlts
programme.desc: Ashleigh Gardner's Trent Rockets venture to the home of cricket in pursuit of a first Women's Hundred win of 2025, taking on Charlie Dean's unbeaten London Spirit. (14.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M10 Hlts
programme.desc: The back-to-back reigning Men's Hundred champions Oval Invincibles travel to Liam Livingstone's winless Phoenix. Sam Billings' side have two wins from two in their 2025 defence. (12.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M14 Hlts
programme.desc: Birmingham Phoenix go to Leeds in pursuit of some momentum as Liam Livingstone's side take on the Superchargers and Graham Clark, who performed final-ball heroics last time out. (15.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M14 Hlts
programme.desc: An out-of-nick Phoenix go to Headingley for a Women's Hundred match with Northern Superchargers, whose perfect start came to an end Wednesday in defeat to the table toppers. (15.08)

programme.title: Live The Hundred
programme.desc: The impressive Southern Brave are the visitors at Trent Bridge as the Georgia Adams' pacesetters go up against Nat Sciver-Brunt and the Trent Rockets in the Women's Hundred.

programme.title: Live The Hundred
programme.desc: Unable to pull off a third consecutive run chase against London Spirit previously, Rockets bid to bounce back at Trent Bridge as Southern Brave pay a visit in the Men's Hundred.

programme.title: Live The Hundred
programme.desc: Having waved goodbye to their unbeaten record, the back-to-back champions look to avoid back-to-back defeats as Oval Invincibles face the Fire's Steve Smith and Jonny Bairstow.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M15 Hlts
programme.desc: Unable to pull off a third consecutive run chase against London Spirit previously, Rockets bid to bounce back at Trent Bridge as Southern Brave pay a visit in the Men's Hundred. (16.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M15 Hlts
programme.desc: The impressive Southern Brave are the visitors at Trent Bridge as the Georgia Adams' pacesetters go up against Nat Sciver-Brunt and the Trent Rockets in the Women's Hundred.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M16 Hlts
programme.desc: Having waved goodbye to their unbeaten record, the back-to-back champions look to avoid back-to-back defeats as Oval Invincibles face the Fire's Steve Smith and Jonny Bairstow. (16.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M16 Hlts
programme.desc: Downing Birmingham for the Invincibles' first win of the campaign, can Alice Capsey inspire the Invincibles once more in a Women's Hundred contest at the Oval against Welsh Fire? (16.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M15 Hlts
programme.desc: Unable to pull off a third consecutive run chase against London Spirit previously, Rockets bid to bounce back at Trent Bridge as Southern Brave pay a visit in the Men's Hundred. (16.08)

programme.title: The Hundred
programme.desc: Downing Birmingham for the Invincibles' first win of the campaign, can Alice Capsey inspire the Invincibles once more in a Women's Hundred contest at the Oval against Welsh Fire?

programme.title: The Best of England v Australia
programme.desc: Remember some of the most incredible individual performances in Ashes history. Here, a look at Adam Gilchrist's excellent performances with the bat in the 2001 series.

programme.desc: Birmingham Phoenix go to Leeds in pursuit of some momentum as Liam Livingstone's side take on the Superchargers and Graham Clark, who performed final-ball heroics last time out. (15.08)

programme.desc: An out-of-nick Phoenix go to Headingley for a Women's Hundred match with Northern Superchargers, whose perfect start came to an end Wednesday in defeat to the table toppers. (15.08)

programme.desc: Unable to pull off a third consecutive run chase against London Spirit previously, Rockets bid to bounce back at Trent Bridge as Southern Brave pay a visit in the Men's Hundred.

programme.desc: Birmingham Phoenix go to Leeds in pursuit of some momentum as Liam Livingstone's side take on the Superchargers and Graham Clark, who performed final-ball heroics last time out. (15.08)

programme.desc: An out-of-nick Phoenix go to Headingley for a Women's Hundred match with Northern Superchargers, whose perfect start came to an end Wednesday in defeat to the table toppers. (15.08)

programme.desc: The impressive Southern Brave are the visitors at Trent Bridge as the Georgia Adams' pacesetters go up against Nat Sciver-Brunt and the Trent Rockets in the Women's Hundred.

programme.desc: Birmingham Phoenix go to Leeds in pursuit of some momentum as Liam Livingstone's side take on the Superchargers and Graham Clark, who performed final-ball heroics last time out. (15.08)

programme.desc: An out-of-nick Phoenix go to Headingley for a Women's Hundred match with Northern Superchargers, whose perfect start came to an end Wednesday in defeat to the table toppers. (15.08)

programme.desc: The back-to-back reigning Men's Hundred champions Oval Invincibles travel to Liam Livingstone's winless Phoenix. Sam Billings' side have two wins from two in their 2025 defence. (12.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M16 Hlts
programme.desc: Having waved goodbye to their unbeaten record, the back-to-back champions look to avoid back-to-back defeats as Oval Invincibles face the Fire's Steve Smith and Jonny Bairstow. (16.08)

programme.desc: Downing Birmingham for the Invincibles' first win of the campaign, can Alice Capsey inspire the Invincibles once more in a Women's Hundred contest at the Oval against Welsh Fire? (16.08)

programme.title: Live The Hundred
programme.desc: As the Women's Hundred continues to hot up, Beth Mooney's Manchester Originals search for a second consecutive win in a clash with Northern Superchargers at Old Trafford.

programme.title: Live The Hundred
programme.desc: With just one win to their name so far this season, Jos Buttler's Manchester Originals take on Northern Superchargers in the Men's Hundred at Old Trafford.

programme.title: Live The Hundred
programme.desc: In the Men's Hundred, Birmingham Phoenix compete with London Spirit. England red-ball star Jamie Smith came to the fore with a knock of 52 in Sprit's latest win.

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M17 Hlts
programme.desc: With just one win to their name so far this season, Jos Buttler's Manchester Originals take on Northern Superchargers in the Men's Hundred at Old Trafford. (17.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M17 Hlts
programme.desc: As the Women's Hundred continues to hot up, Beth Mooney's Manchester Originals search for a second consecutive win in a clash with Northern Superchargers at Old Trafford. (17.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M18 Hlts
programme.desc: In the Men's Hundred, Birmingham Phoenix compete with London Spirit. England red-ball star Jamie Smith came to the fore with a knock of 52 in Sprit's latest win. (17.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Women's - M18 Hlts
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Birmingham Phoenix face Charlie Dean's London Spirit, who lost their first game in four to a Nat Sciver-Brunt-inspired Trent Rockets. (17.08)

programme.title: THE HUNDRED Men's - M17 Hlts
programme.desc: With just one win to their name so far this season, Jos Buttler's Manchester Originals take on Northern Superchargers in the Men's Hundred at Old Trafford. (17.08)

programme.title: The Hundred Women's
programme.desc: In the Women's Hundred, Birmingham Phoenix face Charlie Dean's London Spirit, who lost their first game in four to a Nat Sciver-Brunt-inspired Trent Rockets.

programme.title: 3 Idiots
programme.desc: Two friends, Farhan and Raju, go on an impromptu road trip to find a friend they had lost contact with, Rancho. During the trip they reminisce about college life and Rancho's role in their success.

programme.title: Stuart Little 3: Call of the Wild
programme.desc: Stuart and his family set out to spend their vacation in a lakeside cabin. When Snowbell is taken captive by a beast in the forest, Stuart sets out to rescue him.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

programme.title: Judwa No 1
programme.desc: When a Brahmin woman delivers a stillborn for the third time, her mother-in-law replaces the dead baby with one of another woman's twin babies.

programme.title: 3 Idiots
programme.desc: Two friends, Farhan and Raju, go on an impromptu road trip to find a friend they had lost contact with, Rancho. During the trip they reminisce about college life and Rancho's role in their success.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: The hard-hearted son of a successful factory owner returns to his family after spending years in abroad and pledges to seek revenge on the people who pose a threat to his father's life.

programme.title: Seeru
programme.desc: A turn of events makes Manimaran protect Malli, the henchman who was hired to kill him. In the process of saving Malli, Manimaran ends up locking horns with Ashok Mithran, a corrupt lawyer.

programme.title: iSmart Shankar
programme.desc: Shankar, an assassin, is on the run after murdering a politician. When a twist of fate gives him the memories of a slain police officer, he must help the authorities find a murderer.

programme.title: Baahubali: The Beginning
programme.desc: A child raised by tribal people discovers his royal heritage from the Mahishmati kingdom. Subsequently, he embarks on a mission to overthrow the current ruler and reclaim his rightful throne.

programme.title: K.G.F: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Rocky successfully rises as the leader and saviour of the people of the Kolar Gold Fields. But, in his goal to fulfil his mother's wishes, Rocky must tackle Adheera, Inayat Khalil and Ramika Sen.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: This is TV Show - Entertainment Category

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: This is TV Show - Entertainment Category

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: This is TV Show - Entertainment Category

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: This is TV Show - Entertainment Category

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: This is TV Show - Entertainment Category

programme.title: Aiyaary
programme.desc: Major Jai Bakshi relinquishes his position to take up arms against the higher-ups after catching wind of a large-scale corruption scheme brewing within the military.

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Humraaz
programme.desc: A wealthy Raj Singhania begins an affair with Priya, an entertainer who already has a boyfriend. While they start their relationship, Priya's lover decides to get his revenge on them.

programme.title: A Wednesday!
programme.desc: Prakash Rathod, a retired police commissioner recounts the most memorable case of his career wherein he was informed about a bomb scare in Mumbai by an ordinary commoner.

programme.title: Indu Sarkar
programme.desc: During the Emergency, Indu's husband, a government employee, plans to use the situation to his advantage and move ahead in his career. However, Indu's sense of morality sets her on a different path.

programme.title: Shaadi Ke Side Effects
programme.desc: Two newlyweds' lives turn upside down when they have a baby and find themselves struggling with the challenges of parenthood.

programme.title: Masaan
programme.desc: In Varanasi, Devi struggles to shake off the social stigma of pre-marital sexual relations. Meanwhile, lovers Deepak and Shalu attempt to transcend the restrictions of their casteist society.

programme.title: The Zoya Factor
programme.desc: Zoya, who becomes the lucky charm of the Indian cricket team, is forced to choose between her career as a mascot or Nikhil, the love of her life and the captain of the Indian team.

programme.title: Lamhaa
programme.desc: Vikram, an Indian intelligence agent, is sent to Kashmir to investigate the people responsible for a host of extremist attacks. In his mission, he receives help from a young woman named Aziza.

programme.title: Hum Tum
programme.desc: Karan and Rhea meet on a flight and end up hating each other at the end of their journey. Things change between them when they continue to bump into each other at different stages of their lives.

programme.title: Bang Bang
programme.desc: A charming diamond thief and his unwitting sidekick embark on a rollercoaster of romance, espionage, and explosive transcontinental battles, proving that love can indeed conquer all.

programme.title: Xcuse Me
programme.desc: Two meddling friends Bantu and Chantu join a hotel management programme in Goa by pretending to be the owner's nephew and his friend. While training, they expose many employees and guests as frauds.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Baar Baar Dekho
programme.desc: The highs and lows of a romantic relationship are examined through flashbacks and flash-forwards.

programme.title: Saand Ki Aankh
programme.desc: This biographical movie narrates the story of Chandro and Prakashi Tomar, who defied ageism and patriarchy to take up shooting in their 60s.

programme.title: Rock on 2
programme.desc: Adi decides to host a grand charity concert along with the rest of the members of Magik, a rock band. However, the constant opposition from the local authorities creates hurdles in their pursuit.

programme.title: Zero
programme.desc: Through his relationships with two wildly different women, a vertically challenged bachelor with a larger-than-life persona must discover his purpose.

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Chulbul Pandey, a wayward policeman, kills the brother of a crooked politician. In retribution, the politician sends his henchmen to attack Chulbul's wife which leaves Chulbul infuriated.

programme.title: Dream Girl
programme.desc: Karamveer gets a job at a call centre due to his ability to talk in a woman's voice. He garners a big fan following but soon gets in trouble with his overzealous clients.

programme.title: Bachchhan Pandey
programme.desc: When a struggling filmmaker and actor set out to make a biography on one of the most dreaded gangsters, they have little idea about just how crazy and dangerous it's going to be.

programme.title: Raid
programme.desc: Prabhakaran, a man from Chennai, takes an oath to eradicate wrongdoers in society. However. he faces many struggles and problems from his enemies.

programme.title: Zero
programme.desc: Through his relationships with two wildly different women, a vertically challenged bachelor with a larger-than-life persona must discover his purpose.

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Chulbul Pandey, a wayward policeman, kills the brother of a crooked politician. In retribution, the politician sends his henchmen to attack Chulbul's wife which leaves Chulbul infuriated.

programme.title: Bachchhan Pandey
programme.desc: When a struggling filmmaker and actor set out to make a biography on one of the most dreaded gangsters, they have little idea about just how crazy and dangerous it's going to be.

programme.title: Raid
programme.desc: Prabhakaran, a man from Chennai, takes an oath to eradicate wrongdoers in society. However. he faces many struggles and problems from his enemies.

programme.title: Aakhree Raasta
programme.desc: An ex-convict is bent on revenge against the people responsible for his wrongful imprisonment but is pit against his estranged son who is now a police officer.

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: Multi-millionaire Ranveer Malhotra goes against all odds and takes on some life-threatening obstacles in a bid for survival on an aeroplane after his manufacturing company deals with a massive fiasco.

programme.title: Chup
programme.desc: Inspector General Arvind Mathur investigates the deaths and mutilations of multiple film critics in Mumbai. Soon, he begins to deduce that the culprit is killing his victims due to their reviews.

programme.title: Nanhe Jaisalmer
programme.desc: Nanhe, a tourist guide in Jaisalmer, is obsessed with his favourite actor, Bobby Deol. His dreams turn into reality when he learns that Bobby is visiting his city for a film shoot.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house. S01 E293.

programme.title: Ek Nazar
programme.desc: Ek Nazar

programme.title: Kumkum Bhagya
programme.desc: Shivansh is left startled when he finds out about Prarthana's demands. Later, when Shivansh confronts Prarthana about it, she hesitantly confirms. S01 E3155.

programme.title: Jamai No. 1
programme.desc: A devoted son-in-law navigates the complexities of married life in an attempt to maintain a balance in the family dynamics of his wife's household. S01 E235.

programme.title: Jagriti - Ek Nayi Subah
programme.desc: Jagriti is left perplexed when she receives some shocking photographs on her phone. Later, Jagriti receives an odd letter on her birthday. S01 E336.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house. S01 E10.

programme.title: Tum Se Tum Tak
programme.desc: Anu finds herself in a spot of bother when Harshvardhan rejects her leave application. In the meantime, Aryavardhan finds out about the incident. S01 E40.

programme.title: Kumkum Bhagya
programme.desc: Shivansh is left startled when he finds out about Prarthana's demands. Later, when Shivansh confronts Prarthana about it, she hesitantly confirms. S01 E3155.

programme.title: Jagriti - Ek Nayi Subah

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house. S01 E10.

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
programme.desc: A vengeful Sharda conspires against Reet and plans to kill her. Reet, on the other hand, remains unaware of the brewing conspiracy. S01 E250.

programme.title: Saru
programme.desc: A kabaddi player with aspirations of becoming a district commissioner leaves Rajasthan for Mumbai to attend college, balancing her ambitions while fighting for her mother's rightful family status. S01 E94.

programme.desc: A devoted son-in-law navigates the complexities of married life in an attempt to maintain a balance in the family dynamics of his wife's household. S01 E235.

programme.title: Jamai No. 1
programme.desc: A devoted son-in-law navigates the complexities of married life in an attempt to maintain a balance in the family dynamics of his wife's household. S01 E236.

programme.title: Saru
programme.desc: A kabaddi player with aspirations of becoming a district commissioner leaves Rajasthan for Mumbai to attend college, balancing her ambitions while fighting for her mother's rightful family status. S01 E95.

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
programme.desc: Reet, a career-oriented woman, finds it difficult to deal with the societal pressures of marriage alongside navigating her life as a journalist. S01 E251.

programme.title: Tum Se Tum Tak
programme.desc: Tum Se Tum Tak S01 E41.

programme.title: Kumkum Bhagya
programme.desc: Pragya and Abhi find their lives entwined in a cruel twist of fate. However, despite their initial aversion towards one another, they fall in love and fight to be together against all odds. S01 E3156.

programme.title: Chhoriyan Chali Gaon
programme.desc: Famous female celebrities and television personalities leave their luxurious lifestyles and modern comforts behind to experience rural life and the challenges it brings in an Indian village. S01 E14.

programme.desc: Ek Nazar

programme.desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house. S01 E294.

programme.title: Jagriti - Ek Nayi Subah
programme.desc: A young girl raises her voice against the prejudices leading to unfair societal conventions of labelling her community as undesirables. S01 E337.

programme.desc: A kabaddi player with aspirations of becoming a district commissioner leaves Rajasthan for Mumbai to attend college, balancing her ambitions while fighting for her mother's rightful family status. S01 E95.
